zh.lifeSummary: 當Fernán Pérez Ayala, IX señor de Ayala於1305年出生在西班牙卡斯利亞-拉 曼哈托萊多時，他的父親Pedro López de Ayala, mayor de Murcia27歲，母親Sancha Fernández Barroso24歲。他於大約1328年與Elvira Álvarez de Ceballos結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和11個女兒的父母。他去世於1385年10月15日在西班牙艾尤斯卡迪阿拉瓦維托利亞-加斯泰斯享年80歲，埋葬在西班牙艾尤斯卡迪阿拉瓦阿亞拉-艾亞拉。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Fernán Pérez Ayala, IX señor de Ayala于1305年出生在西班牙卡斯利亞-拉 曼哈托萊多时，他的父亲Pedro López de Ayala, mayor de Murcia27岁，母亲Sancha Fernández Barroso24岁。他于大约1328年与Elvira Álvarez de Ceballos结婚。他们至少是8个儿子和11个女儿的父母。他去世于1385年10月15日在西班牙艾尤斯卡迪阿拉瓦維托利亞-加斯泰斯享年80岁，埋葬在西班牙艾尤斯卡迪阿拉瓦阿亞拉-艾亞拉。

nameMeanings.name: Ayala,
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Juan, Luis, Carlos, Manuel, Jesus, Miguel, Pedro, Francisco, Raul, Jorge, Rafael.
Basque: Castilianized form of Aiala, habitational or topographic name from ai ‘slope, hillside’ + al(h)a ‘pasture’.

nameMeanings.name: IX
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Japanese: written 井伊 ‘well’ and ‘that’, the name one of Japan's great daimyō families, originally based in Tōtōmi (now part of Shizuoka prefecture), later in Kōzuke (now Gunma prefecture) and Ōmi (now Shiga prefecture). Other variants of the name substitute either character with similar sounding characters such as 飯 ‘cooked rice’, 居 ‘residence’, and so forth. It was formerly Romanized as Iyi. — Note: In the population figure published by the US Census Bureau, the Roman number II (meaning ‘the second’, i.e. ‘the younger’ of the two bearers of the name) is apparently also counted as a surname Ii.

History: Ii Naomasa (1561–1602) was awarded lands in Kōzuke and Ōmi for his service in the civil wars that won the shōgunate (military dictatorship) for Tokugawa Ieyasu. His family built the beautiful castle of Hikone, which still stands. His descendant Ii Naosuke (1815–1860) ruled Japan for two years as Tairō (Great Elder) and played a major part in signing treaties that opened Japan to foreign trade at the end of the Tokugawa Shōgunate. He was assassinated by adherents of the anti-foreign party.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

Basque: Castilianized form of Aiala, habitational or topographic name from ai ‘slope, hillside’ + al(h)a ‘pasture’.

nameMeanings.name: Fernán
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A modern form of the old Spanish name Ferdinando, which is of Germanic (Visigothic) origin, from farð ‘journey’ (or possibly an altered form of frið ‘peace’) + nand ‘ready, prepared’. The name was hereditary in the royal families of Spain from an early date. It was borne by Ferdinand I ( d. 1065 ) of Castile and Leon, who conducted successful campaigns against the Moors, and by his descendant Ferdinand V ( 1452–1516 ), who finally expelled the Moors from Spain altogether; he also gave financial backing to Columbus. Through the marriage in 1496 of his daughter Joan the Mad of Castile to the Habsburg Archduke Philip , the name Ferdinand also became hereditary in the Austrian imperial family. Their younger son, Ferdinand ( 1503–64 ), acquired the succession to the kingdoms of Hungary and Bohemia by marriage in 1521 , and became Holy Roman Emperor in 1558 . See Ferdinand .

en.lifeSummary: When Fernán Pérez Ayala, IX señor de Ayala was born in 1305, in Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, Spain, his father, Pedro López de Ayala, mayor de Murcia, was 27 and his mother, Sancha Fernández Barroso, was 24. He married Elvira Álvarez de Ceballos about 1328. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 11 daughters. He died on 15 October 1385, in Vitoria-Gasteiz, Álava, Basque Country, Spain, at the age of 80, and was buried in Ayala-Aiara, Álava, Basque Country, Spain.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Fernán Pérez Ayala, IX señor de Ayala est né en 1305, à Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, Espagne, son père, Pedro López de Ayala, mayor de Murcia, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Sancha Fernández Barroso, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Elvira Álvarez de Ceballos environ 1328. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 11 filles. Il est décédé le 15 octobre 1385, à Vitoria-Gasteiz, Álava, Euskadi, Espagne, à l’âge de 80 ans, et a été enterré à Ayala-Aiara, Álava, Euskadi, Espagne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Fernán Pérez Ayala, IX señor de Ayala 1305 in Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, Spanien geboren wurde, war sein Vater Pedro López de Ayala, mayor de Murcia 27 und seine Mutter Sancha Fernández Barroso 24. Er hat um 1328 Elvira Álvarez de Ceballos geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne und 11 Töchter. Er starb am 15. Oktober 1385 im Alter von 80 Jahren in Vitoria-Gasteiz, Álava, Euskadi, Spanien und wurde in Ayala-Aiara, Álava, Euskadi, Spanien begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Fernán Pérez Ayala, IX señor de Ayala è nato il nel 1305 nel Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, Spagna, il suo padre, Pedro López de Ayala, mayor de Murcia, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Sancha Fernández Barroso, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Elvira Álvarez de Ceballos circa 1328. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli e 11 figlie. Morì il 15 ottobre 1385, nel Vitoria-Gasteiz, Álava, Euskadi, Spagna, all'età di 80 anni, e fu sepolto a Ayala-Aiara, Álava, Euskadi, Spagna.

ja.lifeSummary: Fernán Pérez Ayala, IX señor de Ayalaが1305年にスペインカスティラ-ラ マンチャトーレドで生まれた時，父Pedro López de Ayala, mayor de Murciaは27歳，母Sancha Fernández Barrosoは24歳であった。約1328年にElvira Álvarez de Ceballosと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と11人の娘の親であった。彼は1385年10月15日にスペインエウスカジーaラヴァヴィトリア-ガステイズで80歳で死去し，スペインエウスカジーaラヴァエイアラ-アイアラにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Fernán Pérez Ayala, IX señor de Ayala(이)가 1305년 스페인 카스틸라-라 먼차 톨도에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Pedro López de Ayala, mayor de Murcia(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Sancha Fernández Barroso(은)는 24세였다. 그는 대략 1328년 Elvira Álvarez de Ceballos(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 열 명 이상의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1385년 10월 15일 스페인 우스카디 a라바 비토리아-가스테이즈에서 80세의 나이로 사망했으며 스페인 우스카디 a라바 아야라-아이아라에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Fernán Pérez Ayala, IX señor de Ayala nasceu em 1305, em Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, Espanha, seu pai, Pedro López de Ayala, mayor de Murcia, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Sancha Fernández Barroso, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Elvira Álvarez de Ceballos aproximadamente 1328. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 11 filhas. Ele faleceu em 15 de outubro de 1385, em Vitoria-Gasteiz, Álava, Euskadi, Espanha, com 80 anos, e foi sepultado em Ayala-Aiara, Álava, Euskadi, Espanha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Fernán Pérez Ayala, IX señor de Ayala родился в 1305 г. в местности толедо, кастилла-ла манча, Испания, его отцу по имени Pedro López de Ayala, mayor de Murcia было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Sancha Fernández Barroso, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Elvira Álvarez de Ceballos около 1328 г. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 11 дочерей. Он умер 15 октября 1385 г. в местности виторя-гастиз, aлава, эускади, Испания в возрасте 80 лет и был похоронен в местности аяла-еиара, aлава, эускади, Испания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Fernán Pérez Ayala, IX señor de Ayala nació en 1305, en Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, España, su papá, Pedro López de Ayala, mayor de Murcia, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Sancha Fernández Barroso, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Elvira Álvarez de Ceballos aproximadamente 1328. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos y 11 hijas. Murió el 15 de octubre de 1385, en Vitoria-Gasteiz, Álava, País Vasco, España, a la edad de 80 años, y fue sepultado en Ayala-Aiara, Álava, País Vasco, España.
